$comment: FC16 (D-CSUBSET-GENERIC-SELECTION): C11/C23 6.5.1.1 generic selection. tc(x) = _Generic((x), int:1, char:2, double:3, default:0); tc(int)=1, tc(double)=3 -> 1*10+3 = 13. The controlling type drives a COMPILE-TIME selection (in the semantic tier); the CST->HIR lowering lowers ONLY the selected association's expression. Data-model-independent types (int=4, double=8 on LP64+LLP64). The `release` arm loads the shipped release pipeline so the selection witnesses end-to-end under real optimization across all four targets.
